title: LZRinue Cellophane Wrap Roll, Double Folded 20M x 84cm Christmas Clear Cellophane Wrapping Roll Printed with Gold Dot for Xmas Gift Wrapping, Hampers, Food, Birthday Gifts, Flowers and Crafts Wrap
features: Package: The package contains 1 roll clear cellophane wrap roll printed with gold dot.It will be convenient to use, no fold mark and edge.

Suitable size: Clear cellophane wrap roll are 84cm in width and 20m in length. The cellophane are double folded and you need to open it to get 84cm. This is a large roll that you can wrap different sizes of baskets and gifts.

High Quality: This gift wrapping roll are made of premium cellophane, which is transparent, odorless, strong and not easy to tear, perfect for preventing moisture and dust from entering, keeping food fresh and clean.
Widely Use: Clear cellophane wrapping rolls are perfect for gift baskets, bouquets, candies, Christmas cookies, cakes, wine, artwork, and more. It will be useful for so many gifts.

Easy to use: First, cut it into the desired length, then wrap it around the stem and decorate it with ribbons, so you can give flowers or gifts to your loved ones. Our clear cellophane packaging rolls can be easily combined with other wrapping materials.
description: Product Description Excellent Material Quality Our cellophane wrap roll is robust, resistant to wear, and difficult to damage. High transparency, cleanliness, waterproofness, and excellent style High Quality Our cellophane wrap roll is robust, resistant to wear, and difficult to damage. High transparency, cleanliness, waterproofness, and excellent style. Unique design Cellophane wrap are clear material printed with gold dots. Great for hampers, baskets, flowers, Christmas cookies and Christmas gift wrapping. Widely Use Clear cellophane wrapping rolls are perfect for gift baskets, bouquets, candies, Christmas cookies, cakes, wine, artwork, and more. Easy to Use Firstly, unfold the cellophane roll, cut it to the length you need, then wrap the product you need to wrap in it, and tie the drawstring, so you can get a nice wrapping.Tough, wear-resistant, not easy to be damaged. Dust-proof, high transparency, clean, waterproof, very good styling.
